title: Umea Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is hitting Umea with a Z-Score of -4.57. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Umea are extremely cold, with a high heating degree day (HDD) value of 17.0 GG. 
 The relative humidity is 82%, and the wind speed is 14.0 km/h, making the cold feel even more intense. 
 The cold snap is expected to continue, with no cooling degree days (CDD) forecasted, indicating no relief from the cold temperatures.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols immediately due to critical weather conditions.
